André Onana.bio: World-class Cameroonian goalkeeper who is the undisputed number one at Manchester United. Developed at the Barcelona academy before starring at Ajax and Inter Milan.
André Onana.playingStyle: Sweeper-keeper with exceptional distribution, bold positioning, and command of the penalty area
André Onana.worldCup2026Role: Undisputed starting goalkeeper and one of the best keepers at the tournament
André Onana.notableFact: Reached the Champions League final with Inter Milan in 2023 and was signed by Manchester United for a reported 47 million pounds

Christopher Wooh.bio: Young Cameroonian center-back who has been developing well at Stade Rennais in Ligue 1. A physical defender with good aerial ability and improving distribution.
Christopher Wooh.playingStyle: Athletic, physical center-back who dominates in aerial duels and defends with aggression
Christopher Wooh.worldCup2026Role: Starting center-back or key rotation defender bringing youth and physicality
Christopher Wooh.notableFact: Made the move from Belgian football to Ligue 1 and has quickly established himself as a first-team regular

Enzo Tchato.bio: Young Cameroonian right-back playing at Montpellier in Ligue 1. A modern, attack-minded full-back with energy and pace to burn up and down the flank.
Enzo Tchato.playingStyle: Energetic, attacking right-back who provides width and pace in the final third
Enzo Tchato.worldCup2026Role: Attacking right-back option providing a dynamic presence on the flank
Enzo Tchato.notableFact: Has been one of the emerging young full-back talents in Ligue 1 with Montpellier

Enzo Ebosse.bio: Left-footed Cameroonian center-back who has carved out a career in Serie A with Udinese. His ability to play from the left side of defense makes him a valuable tactical option.
Enzo Ebosse.playingStyle: Left-footed center-back who builds play from the back and provides balance to the defense
Enzo Ebosse.worldCup2026Role: Starting or rotation center-back valued for his left foot and Serie A experience
Enzo Ebosse.notableFact: Born in France to Cameroonian parents, he chose to represent Cameroon at international level

Michael Ngadeu-Ngadjui.bio: Experienced Cameroonian center-back who has been a stalwart of the national team for years. A commanding presence in Belgian football with Gent.
Michael Ngadeu-Ngadjui.playingStyle: Tall, commanding center-back who organizes the defense and wins aerial battles
Michael Ngadeu-Ngadjui.worldCup2026Role: Veteran defensive leader providing experience and organization from the backline
Michael Ngadeu-Ngadjui.notableFact: Has been a key figure in Cameroon's qualification campaigns and AFCON tournaments for nearly a decade

Ambroise Oyongo.bio: Veteran Cameroonian left-back who has had an extensive career including time in MLS with the Montreal Impact. Brings vast international experience to the squad.
Ambroise Oyongo.playingStyle: Experienced left-back who provides defensive stability and measured support in attack
Ambroise Oyongo.worldCup2026Role: Veteran backup left-back providing depth and leadership to the defensive group
Ambroise Oyongo.notableFact: Has represented Cameroon at multiple AFCON tournaments and has over 50 international caps

Léandre Tawamba.bio: Experienced Cameroonian striker who has been a prolific goalscorer in domestic and African football. Brings physicality and goal threat to the attacking lineup.
Léandre Tawamba.playingStyle: Physical, powerful striker who holds the ball up and finishes with authority
Léandre Tawamba.worldCup2026Role: Experienced squad striker providing a physical option in attack and domestic league experience
Léandre Tawamba.notableFact: Has been one of the top goalscorers in Cameroonian domestic football for several seasons

André-Frank Zambo Anguissa.bio: Elite Cameroonian midfielder who has been one of the best in Serie A at Napoli. A complete midfielder whose power, technique, and tenacity make him world-class.
André-Frank Zambo Anguissa.playingStyle: Dominant box-to-box midfielder who combines physical power with technical quality and tireless running
André-Frank Zambo Anguissa.worldCup2026Role: Cameroon's most important outfield player and midfield engine who drives the team forward
André-Frank Zambo Anguissa.notableFact: Was a key player in Napoli's Serie A title win in 2023, their first league championship in over 30 years

Eric Maxim Choupo-Moting.bio: Well-traveled Cameroonian forward who has played at PSG, Bayern Munich, and now in MLS. Despite never being the main star, he has consistently contributed at the highest level.
Eric Maxim Choupo-Moting.playingStyle: Tall, technical forward who can hold the ball, link play, and finish in the box
Eric Maxim Choupo-Moting.worldCup2026Role: Experienced veteran striker providing depth, hold-up play, and big-game experience
Eric Maxim Choupo-Moting.notableFact: Scored a last-minute Champions League equalizer for PSG against Atalanta in 2020, one of the most dramatic goals in the tournament's history

Vincent Aboubakar.bio: Cameroon's captain and most prolific active goalscorer. A national hero who scored twice in the group stage at the 2022 World Cup, including a memorable winner against Brazil.
Vincent Aboubakar.playingStyle: Complete striker with intelligent movement, clinical finishing, and the ability to create for others
Vincent Aboubakar.worldCup2026Role: Captain and attacking leader whose goals and leadership drive Cameroon's tournament ambitions
Vincent Aboubakar.notableFact: Scored the winning goal against Brazil at the 2022 World Cup, becoming an instant legend in Cameroonian football

Bryan Mbeumo.bio: Explosive Cameroonian winger who has been one of the Premier League's most dangerous attackers at Brentford. His pace and finishing have drawn attention from top clubs across Europe.
Bryan Mbeumo.playingStyle: Pacy, left-footed winger who cuts inside from the right and finishes with precision
Bryan Mbeumo.worldCup2026Role: Star attacker and one of Cameroon's most potent weapons, expected to be the primary goal threat
Bryan Mbeumo.notableFact: Has been one of the top scorers in the Premier League at Brentford, outperforming many more expensive forwards

Devis Epassy.bio: Experienced Cameroonian goalkeeper who has been a reliable backup and occasional starter for the national team. Currently plays in the Saudi Pro League.
Devis Epassy.playingStyle: Solid, dependable goalkeeper with good shot-stopping ability and presence on crosses
Devis Epassy.worldCup2026Role: Second-choice goalkeeper providing experienced backup to Onana
Devis Epassy.notableFact: Was Cameroon's starting goalkeeper at the 2022 World Cup in Qatar, performing admirably on the biggest stage

Collins Fai.bio: Long-serving Cameroonian right-back who has been a fixture of the national team for years. A dependable defender who provides consistency and experience on the right flank.
Collins Fai.playingStyle: Dependable, hard-working right-back who fulfills his defensive duties and supports the attack
Collins Fai.worldCup2026Role: Experienced backup right-back providing depth and reliability on the flanks
Collins Fai.notableFact: Has over 55 caps for Cameroon and has represented the country at multiple AFCON tournaments and World Cups

Martin Hongla.bio: Cameroonian midfielder who has built a solid career in Serie A with Verona. A hard-working midfielder who provides energy and combativeness in the center of the park.
Martin Hongla.playingStyle: Energetic, combative midfielder who wins tackles, breaks up play, and drives forward
Martin Hongla.worldCup2026Role: Midfield rotation option providing energy, defensive quality, and Serie A experience
Martin Hongla.notableFact: Has been a regular starter in Serie A with Verona, gaining experience in one of Europe's most tactically demanding leagues

Jean-Charles Castelletto.bio: French-born Cameroonian center-back who has been a solid performer at Nantes in Ligue 1. Chose to represent Cameroon at international level and has become a regular in the squad.
Jean-Charles Castelletto.playingStyle: Steady, composed center-back who reads the game well and distributes cleanly
Jean-Charles Castelletto.worldCup2026Role: Starting center-back or reliable rotation option in the defensive line
Jean-Charles Castelletto.notableFact: Scored Cameroon's first goal at the 2022 World Cup in Qatar against Switzerland

Olivier Ntcham.bio: Talented Cameroonian midfielder who came through the Manchester City academy and played for Celtic in Scotland. A technically gifted player with passing vision.
Olivier Ntcham.playingStyle: Technical midfielder with good vision, neat passing, and the ability to pick out forward runners
Olivier Ntcham.worldCup2026Role: Creative midfield option who can provide a different dimension with his passing quality
Olivier Ntcham.notableFact: Came through Manchester City's academy and won multiple Scottish league titles with Celtic

Karl Toko Ekambi.bio: Experienced Cameroonian winger who made his name in Ligue 1 with Lyon, becoming one of their key players. A direct and pacy attacker who scores important goals.
Karl Toko Ekambi.playingStyle: Direct, pacy winger who runs at defenders, gets into scoring positions, and finishes clinically
Karl Toko Ekambi.worldCup2026Role: Experienced wide attacker providing goals, pace, and big-game experience
Karl Toko Ekambi.notableFact: Was Cameroon's top scorer at AFCON 2021 on home soil with five goals, including crucial knockout stage strikes

Clinton N'Jie.bio: Former Tottenham Hotspur and Lyon winger who has experienced football at the highest level in Europe. Now plays in Cyprus but brings valuable international experience.
Clinton N'Jie.playingStyle: Quick, skillful winger who takes on defenders and delivers crosses from wide positions
Clinton N'Jie.worldCup2026Role: Experienced squad player providing attacking depth and versatility from the bench
Clinton N'Jie.notableFact: Played in the Premier League with Tottenham Hotspur and in Ligue 1 with Lyon and Marseille

Christian Bassogog.bio: Cameroonian winger who became famous at AFCON 2017 when he was named Player of the Tournament as Cameroon won the title. Known for his explosive pace.
Christian Bassogog.playingStyle: Blisteringly fast winger who terrifies defenders with his raw speed and direct running
Christian Bassogog.worldCup2026Role: Impact substitute whose raw pace can devastate tiring defenses late in matches
Christian Bassogog.notableFact: Named Player of the Tournament at AFCON 2017 despite being relatively unknown before the competition

Georges-Kevin Nkoudou.bio: French-born Cameroonian winger who played for Tottenham in the Premier League before moving to Turkish football with Besiktas. A pacy attacker with European pedigree.
Georges-Kevin Nkoudou.playingStyle: Quick, direct winger who stretches defenses with his pace and delivers crosses from wide areas
Georges-Kevin Nkoudou.worldCup2026Role: Wide attacking depth option providing pace and quality from the bench
Georges-Kevin Nkoudou.notableFact: Won a Turkish league title with Besiktas and played in the Premier League with Tottenham Hotspur

Jean-Pierre Nsame.bio: Prolific Cameroonian striker who has been a goalscoring machine at Young Boys in the Swiss Super League. One of the most consistent scorers in Swiss football history.
Jean-Pierre Nsame.playingStyle: Clinical penalty-box striker who finds space, makes runs, and finishes with composure
Jean-Pierre Nsame.worldCup2026Role: Goal-hungry striker option providing a proven scoring record as a backup or rotation option
Jean-Pierre Nsame.notableFact: Won the Swiss Super League Golden Boot multiple times and has been the top scorer in the league in multiple seasons

Simon Ngapandouetnbu.bio: Young Cameroonian goalkeeper who has emerged from Marseille's academy. One of the most exciting young goalkeeping talents in French football.
Simon Ngapandouetnbu.playingStyle: Tall, athletic young goalkeeper with quick reflexes and modern distribution skills
Simon Ngapandouetnbu.worldCup2026Role: Young third-choice goalkeeper gaining experience in the senior international setup
Simon Ngapandouetnbu.notableFact: Became one of the youngest goalkeepers in Marseille's history when he was given first-team opportunities

Nouhou Tolo.bio: Fan-favorite Cameroonian left-back who has become a cult hero at Seattle Sounders in MLS. Known for his passionate defending and infectious energy on and off the pitch.
Nouhou Tolo.playingStyle: Aggressive, energetic left-back who tackles ferociously and provides overlapping runs with enthusiasm
Nouhou Tolo.worldCup2026Role: Starting or backup left-back who brings energy, passion, and defensive tenacity
Nouhou Tolo.notableFact: Became a cult hero in Seattle for his enthusiastic, all-action style of play and has won the MLS Cup with the Sounders

Pierre Kunde.bio: Experienced Cameroonian midfielder who has played in Spain, France, and Greece. A versatile midfielder who provides quality in multiple midfield roles.
Pierre Kunde.playingStyle: Technically sound, versatile midfielder who can play as a holder or box-to-box player
Pierre Kunde.worldCup2026Role: Midfield depth player providing versatility and experience across different positions
Pierre Kunde.notableFact: Has played across four different European leagues, giving him a wide range of tactical experience

Carlos Baleba.bio: Exceptional young Cameroonian midfielder who has burst onto the scene at Brighton in the Premier League. Considered one of the most promising young midfielders in world football.
Carlos Baleba.playingStyle: Dynamic, intelligent young midfielder who breaks up play, carries the ball, and distributes with maturity beyond his years
Carlos Baleba.worldCup2026Role: Key young midfielder who could be a breakout star of the tournament with his dynamism and quality
Carlos Baleba.notableFact: Brighton signed him as one of the most exciting young talents in French football, and he has immediately impressed in the Premier League

Georges Douath.bio: Young Cameroonian midfielder developing at Red Bull Salzburg in Austria. Part of the pipeline of Cameroonian talent coming through European football academies.
Georges Douath.playingStyle: Energetic young midfielder who presses high, recovers possession, and transitions play quickly
Georges Douath.worldCup2026Role: Young squad member gaining experience, available as an energetic midfield option from the bench
Georges Douath.notableFact: Came through Red Bull Salzburg's famed development system, which has produced numerous top-level players
